channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: New era of college football could help other teams replicate Indiana's remarkable rise
item.description: Indiana has made the type of turnaround that had only happened once before at the power-conference level over the last decade.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NFL has 'no issue' with Trump dance celebrations amid recent trend
item.description: The NFL confirmed to Fox News Digital on Tuesday it had "no issue" with players emulating President-elect Trump with their celebratory dances.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rafael Nadal will play Davis Cup singles for Spain against the Netherlands ahead of retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal has been picked to play singles for Spain against the Netherlands at the Davis Cup Final 8.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Leland, sophomore superstar Chrissy Flynn take on NorCal water polo with lessons from Olympic sister Jenna
item.description: Thanks to some tips from a family full of elite water polo players, Leland star Chrissy Flynn is ready to lead the Chargers into the Northern California Division II playoffs
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Roger Federer tells friend and rival Rafael Nadal that he made him enjoy tennis more
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Roger Federer says Rafael Nadal made him enjoy tennis “even more” during a rivalry that spanned 40 matches over 15 years.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah State women's volleyball star applauds school as it seeks to be added to Mountain West lawsuit
item.description: Utah State women's volleyball star Kylie Ray applauded her school as it sought to enter as a plaintiff in a lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bronny James has a left heel bruise and is listed as doubtful for the Lakers' next game
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James has a bruised left heel, and he is listed as doubtful for the Los Angeles Lakers' next game against the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: F1 to move Canadian Grand Prix slot on calendar in drive to cut travel
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Formula 1 will move the Canadian Grand Prix to a new slot in May from 2026 in an effort to cut down on travel and its environmental impact.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Morgan, San Juan, Beaver win state football titles
item.description: CEDAR CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of unbeatens, Morgan High proved to be the last team standing in the 3A high school football playoffs. The Trojans beat Richfield in a defensive battle Saturday night at Southern Utah University, 13-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: SJSU volleyball captain demands removal of transgender athlete
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- Some San Jose State University women's volleyball players are suing their head coach, their university, and the Division-1 Mountain West Conference for allowing a transgender player to be on the team.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Corner Canyon beats Lehi in OT to advance to 6A title game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Corner Canyon is headed back to the 6A championship game, after a 35-34 overtime thriller over Lehi Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago Sports Network launching subscription streaming service
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Sports Network is launching a streaming service Friday amid its negotiations with Xfinity. The subscription service will start at $19.99 for one team or $29.99 for full access to CHSN. A 7-day free trial is being offered.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Vejmelka makes 49 saves as Utah beats Carolina, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club needed a victory in the worst way, and backup goalie Karel Vejmelka made sure they got one. Vejmelka made a career-high 49 saves, as Utah killed off over ten minutes of power plays in route to a 4-1 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Want a Utah Hockey Club jersey? Circle this day on your calendar
item.description: Eager to get your hands on an inaugural Utah Hockey Club jersey? You'll want to circle Friday, Nov. 15.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Bears release OL Nate Davis
item.description: CHICAGO — The Nate Davis era is over at Halas Hall after the Bears cut him Wednesday. The lineman had a tough time finding the field despite being paid over $10 million a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for throwing water bottle at football game between U of U, BYU
item.description: An 18-year-old was arrested after reportedly throwing a water bottle onto the field during the BYU-Utah game on Nov. 9.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky introduce new head coach Tyler Marsh
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A little more than a month after former head coach Teresa Weatherspoon was unceremoniously relieved of her duties, the Chicago Sky introduced their new head coach to the Windy City Tuesday. Tyler Marsh, who was hired on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utes mired in longest losing streak in 11 years
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It has been one of the most disappointing seasons in Utah football history, and head coach Kyle Whittingham is feeling the pain. "It's been one of the most frustrating seasons of my career," Whittingham said on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gerry Faust, former head football coach at Notre Dame, has died at 89
item.description: Gerry Faust, the gravel-voiced Cincinnati high school coach who lived a dream by becoming the coach at Notre Dame, has died. He was 89.
item.dc:creator: RUSTY MILLER AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC
